t: Station Master Orchestrator — ingest() entry point wiring all station modules

content.signature: ingest(rawPayload: string | object, source: IngestSource, userId: string): Promise<StationReceipt>
content.receipt: { sessionId, lineId, forkId?, recordsStored, mergeCandidates[], ingestSource }

_behavior_directive.what_this_is: The orchestrator work item — wires all station modules together. TRACK in task graph, execute after all module tasks are complete.
_behavior_directive.what_this_is_NOT: An instruction to execute automatically. Only file that touches DB directly; all business logic lives in the modules it calls.
_behavior_directive.expected_outcome: Single ingest() function that accepts raw payload and returns a typed StationReceipt
